description: Pass 3 must not emit score_0_10 > 5 with confidence_level 'low'. That pair is incoherent: a score above 5 asserts confidence; low confidence asserts the opposite. The gate v2_fidelity_score_confidence_alignment must detect and refuse to ship this contradiction.

input_stub.rationale: The prose demonstrates strong lyrical control throughout.

expected.notes: Evidence jobs: 15a655ae-6658-4e1e-b39b-b10542cd5f87 and bae4c87b-87f9-4000-ab86-d20124ce251c. Root cause: PASS3_EMITTED_HIGH_SCORE_WITH_LOW_CONFIDENCE. Fix: PR I prompt hardening (pass3-synthesis v10).
